data.title: Mobileye, Palantir Tech And Affirm Are Among Top Large Cap Losers Last Week (Jan 6-10): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
data.description: Several large-cap stocks saw significant declines last week, possibly due to wildfires in California and overall market weakness.

data.title: Walgreens Boots Alliance, Aurora Innovation And Delta Air Lines Are Among Top Large Cap Gainers Last Week (Jan 6-10): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
data.description: Top performers in last week's stock market: Walgreens, Constellation Energy, FTAI Aviation, TD SYNNEX, Aurora Innovation, Royalty Pharma, Micron, Delta Air Lines, Intra-Cellular Therapies, United Airlines.

data.title: Apple's Market Woes, Tim Cook's 2024 Salary, And Siri Privacy Concerns: This Week In Appleverse
data.description: Apple faced market share decline in China while CEO Tim Cook got a pay raise. Siri privacy policies were clarified and AI flaws were acknowledged. Rival Samsung introduced an AI subscription model for its Galaxy smartphones.

data.title: Job Growth, Fed Jitters, And Rising Mortgage Rates: This Week In Economics
data.description: The week has been a rollercoaster ride for the U.S. economy. From a slowdown in private sector job growth to rising inflation concerns at the Federal Reserve, the economic landscape has been anything but predictable.

data.title: Supreme Court Hears Tiktok Case, Google Donates To Trump Inauguration, And More: This Week In Politics
data.description: Significant past week: Supreme Court hears TikTok ban arguments, Google donates $1M to Trump inauguration, Amazon invests $40M in Melania doc.
